title: Add E2E tests for concurrent CR conflicts and failover
summary: Post-external-review fixes addressing 5 WARNING findings from berendt. All fixes are correct and complete: (1) documentation step numbering corrected from 7 to 8 steps with cascading updates to design notes, flow diagram, and diagnostics table; (2) --log-label replaced with --dep-label and --dep-ns=default in catch block documentation; (3-4) range assertions replaced with exact-match assertions across both test files (4 occurrences total); (5) diagnostics table step references updated. No new issues introduced.

tests_checklist.item: E2E test assertions use exact-match values for deterministic fields (availableReplicas)
Operator-pod-kill test has 8 steps matching documentation
Catch blocks reference correct diagnostics.sh flags (--dep-label, --dep-ns)

code_quality_checklist.item: Documentation step table matches actual chainsaw-test.yaml steps
Design notes reference correct step numbers after renumbering
Flow diagram and numbered list updated consistently
Diagnostics table references correct steps for Pod Kill (009)

security_checklist.item: No security-relevant changes in this diff

architecture_checklist.item: Changes are scoped to fixing external review feedback only
No scope creep beyond the 5 WARNING fixes

fail_fast_checklist.item: Exact-match assertions fail immediately on unexpected state
